title: Weekly FnB Trending Keywords
description: Normalised weekly social-listening output for F&B trending keywords. Single source of truth for all downstream consumers (ArkClaw query layer, dashboards, exports).

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this file was produced.

start.description: Start of the weekly window (Monday 09:00 HKT).

end.description: End of the weekly window (next Monday 09:00 HKT).

mode.description: Whether this run used fixture data or live Apify actors.

timezone.description: IANA timezone used for window calculations.

config_hash.description: Optional hash of the config used, for reproducibility tracking.

keywords.description: Ranked list of trending keywords, ordered by social_composite_score descending.

display_name.description: Human-readable display name (may include localised characters).

representative_term.description: The social-media surface term that best represents this keyword.

category.description: Optional F&B category (e.g. beverage, snack, dining, dessert, cuisine). Null when unclassified.

social_composite_score.description: Weighted composite score across all platforms. Higher = more trending. Scale depends on pipeline scoring rules; normalisation to 0-100 is a future concern.

trend_direction.description: Direction: up (growing), down (declining), stable (flat), new (first appearance).

platform_hits.description: Number of platforms where this keyword passed the trending threshold.

platforms.description: Per-platform metrics keyed by platform name.

current_volume.description: Current-week volume. Null if platform has no data for this keyword.

passed_trending.description: Whether this keyword met the platform's trending thresholds.

is_new.description: Whether this keyword is newly surfaced (no prior-week data).

total_ranked.description: Number of keywords that made the final ranked list.

previous_feed_used.description: Whether a previous-week feed was provided for trend comparison.
